examples.title: Checking Force = Mass × Acceleration
examples.content: F = ma. Left: F = [M L T⁻²]. Right: m × a = [M] × [L T⁻²] = [M L T⁻²]. ✓ Dimensions match! Equation is plausible.

examples.title: Catching a Mistake
examples.content: Someone writes: distance = speed + time. Left: [L]. Right: [L T⁻¹] + [T] = ???. Dimensions don't match! The equation is WRONG.

examples.title: Checking E = mc²
examples.content: E = mc². Left: [M L² T⁻²]. Right: [M] × ([L T⁻¹])² = [M L² T⁻²]. ✓ Perfect match!
